finding_evidence: reproducer or reasoning for non-obvious issues

pass_criteria: Every accepted finding names base/head SHA and file context.
Accepted blockers trace to judged evidence packets.
No review worker edits files during Run 1.
fail_criteria: The PR bridge omits base or head SHA.
A finding is based only on model prose.
The bridge directly applies fixes before Round F approval.
negative_controls: Diff fixture without base_sha or head_sha.
Finding with no file path, hunk, line, or surrounding code context.
PR bridge that applies a fix during Run 1.
